name: Easy Seafood Stew
recipeIngredient: 13 oz Canned chopped or minced clams, undrained
6 oz Canned white crab, drained and rinsed
6 oz Canned shrimp, drained and rinsed
10 3/4 oz Canned condensed sodium-reduced tomato soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large, heavy saucepan. Add the onion and garlic and cook, covered, over low heat for about 15 minutes, or until the onion is soft and translucent.
2. Stir in all remaining ingredients and continue to cook, covered, over low heat for about 10 minutes, or until hot.
